'''鈭歷-r-y''' ('''kavaray''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polymedicate|polymedicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polymedicate|polymedicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kavaray
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivaray|thivaray]] || [[word:jivaray|jivaray]] || [[word:shivaray|shivaray]] || [[word:kivaray|kivaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvaray|thuthuvaray]] || [[word:jujuvaray|jujuvaray]] || [[word:shushuvaray|shushuvaray]] || [[word:kukuvaray|kukuvaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvaray|thuvaray]] || [[word:juvaray|juvaray]] || [[word:shuvaray|shuvaray]] || [[word:kuvaray|kuvaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvaray|thuvaray]] || [[word:juvaray|juvaray]] || [[word:shuvaray|shuvaray]] || [[word:kuvaray|kuvaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevaray|thevaray]] || [[word:jevaray|jevaray]] || [[word:shevaray|shevaray]] || [[word:kevaray|kevaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovaray|thothovaray]] || [[word:jojovaray|jojovaray]] || [[word:shoshovaray|shoshovaray]] || [[word:kokovaray|kokovaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovaray|thovaray]] || [[word:jovaray|jovaray]] || [[word:shovaray|shovaray]] || [[word:kovaray|kovaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovaray|thovaray]] || [[word:jovaray|jovaray]] || [[word:shovaray|shovaray]] || [[word:kovaray|kovaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙varay|th忙varay]] || [[word:j忙varay|j忙varay]] || [[word:sh忙varay|sh忙varay]] || [[word:k忙varay|k忙varay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavaray|thathavaray]] || [[word:jajavaray|jajavaray]] || [[word:shashavaray|shashavaray]] || [[word:kakavaray|kakavaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavaray|thavaray]] || [[word:javaray|javaray]] || [[word:shavaray|shavaray]] || [[word:kavaray|kavaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavaray|thavaray]] || [[word:javaray|javaray]] || [[word:shavaray|shavaray]] || [[word:kavaray|kavaray]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavaray|shavaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavaray|goshavaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavaray|gokishavaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavarayn眉|shavarayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavaraynkn眉|goshavaraynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavarayn眉|gokishavarayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavaraysh毛|shavaraysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavaraynksh毛|goshavaraynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavaraysh毛|gokishavaraysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavarayro|shavarayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavaraynkro|goshavaraynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavarayro|gokishavarayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavaraymu|shavaraymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavaraynkmu|goshavaraynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavaraymu|gokishavaraymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavaraysher|shavaraysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavaraynksher|goshavaraynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavaraysher|gokishavaraysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavarayng|shavarayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavaraynkng|goshavaraynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavarayng|gokishavarayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavaraya|shavaraya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavaraynkya|goshavaraynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavaraya|gokishavaraya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavarayam|shavarayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavaraynkyam|goshavaraynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavarayam|gokishavarayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavarayn眉sh毛|shavarayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavaraynkn眉sh毛|goshavaraynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavarayn眉sh毛|gokishavarayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavarayn眉ro|shavarayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavaraynkn眉ro|goshavaraynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavarayn眉ro|gokishavarayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavarayn眉mu|shavarayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavaraynkn眉mu|goshavaraynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavarayn眉mu|gokishavarayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavaraysh毛n眉|shavaraysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavaraynksh毛n眉|goshavaraynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavaraysh毛n眉|gokishavaraysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavaraysh毛ro|shavaraysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavaraynksh毛ro|goshavaraynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavaraysh毛ro|gokishavaraysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavaraysh毛mu|shavaraysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavaraynksh毛mu|goshavaraynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavaraysh毛mu|gokishavaraysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavarayron眉|shavarayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavaraynkron眉|goshavaraynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavarayron眉|gokishavarayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavarayrosh毛|shavarayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavaraynkrosh毛|goshavaraynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavarayrosh毛|gokishavarayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavarayromu|shavarayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavaraynkromu|goshavaraynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavarayromu|gokishavarayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavaraymun眉|shavaraymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavaraynkmun眉|goshavaraynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavaraymun眉|gokishavaraymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavaraymush毛|shavaraymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavaraynkmush毛|goshavaraynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavaraymush毛|gokishavaraymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavaraymuro|shavaraymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavaraynkmuro|goshavaraynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavaraymuro|gokishavaraymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
